holdings.infoBox: EPMV is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 4.48%, ON Semiconductor at 3.75%, Cummins at 3.61%, Applied Materials at 2.45%, and Synopsys at 2.44%.

overview.description: The Harbor Mid Cap Value ETF (EPMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in 40-70 undervalued mid-cap companies in the US, selected using fundamental research. The fund seeks total return. EPMV was launched on May 1, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.
